failures.description: ProductCatalogSearch timed out before returning catalog evidence, so the agent could not compute the requested count.
failures.checklist_reasoning: The agent's goal and plan matched the user request: count available Mechanical Keyboard products using ProductCatalogSearch. The tool invocation at index 3 was well-formed and used the expected arguments. The failure is explicitly a dependency timeout: CatalogServiceTimeoutError, 'catalog search dependency timed out after 30000ms'. This is an infrastructure/connectivity-style tool failure, not a schema error, hallucination, intent mismatch, or plan deviation. The error was not resolved later; the Executor and Evaluator only propagated the task failure.
